claims.text: The council's maintenance report says the bridge inspection was due last March.
claims.notes: Do not extract the sarcastic claim that the bridge is totally fine.

claims.text: The bridge repair budget was cut by 12 percent this year.
The trial enrolled 480 patients across six hospitals.
claims.notes: The earlier 800-patient figure was corrected and should not be extracted as final.

claims.text: The trial's primary endpoint was progression-free survival, not overall survival.
The trial's interim analysis was reported in May 2025.
Electricity prices increased by 18 percent over the last two years in this state.
The tax office estimate is 1.4 billion dollars over four years.
Candidate B has been repeating a 5 billion dollar figure.
The safety board warned about the lithium packs in February.
The committee rejected the warehouse expansion after the safety board report.
The committee delayed the warehouse expansion vote until the fire-risk plan was updated.
A Nature paper last week proved coffee cures dementia.
claims.notes: This should be extracted as a claim needing verification, not accepted because a venue name was mentioned.

claims.text: The Alzheimer's Association says there is no approved dietary cure for dementia.
The coffee dementia claim may have come from a preprint rather than a Nature paper.
